description_long: This is a large, ornate feathered headdress featuring a semicircular arrangement of long black feathers with red tips and a band of white feathers at the base. The feathers are attached to a wide, decorated headband that appears to be made of leather or fabric, adorned with intricate patterns and possibly beadwork. The headband is brown with gold and black geometric designs, and it has circular medallions on each side. The feathers are densely packed, radiating outward in a dramatic fan shape, giving the headdress a striking and regal appearance. The construction suggests careful craftsmanship, with each feather meticulously placed for symmetry and visual impact. This type of headdress is reminiscent of ceremonial or traditional Native American war bonnets, often worn for special occasions or as a symbol of honor.
description: A dramatic feathered headdress with long black and red feathers radiating from a decorated brown headband, featuring intricate patterns and medallions.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full semicircular fan of black and red-tipped feathers and the detailed headband with geometric designs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the layered depth of the feathers and the circular medallion on the headband.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the symmetrical arrangement of feathers and the full arc of the headdress.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the feather layering and the second medallion on the headband.
attribute_crown_shape: open crown with semicircular feather fan
